what-are-embeddings.instruction: Explain embeddings to someone who understands spreadsheets but not ML. Use a physical space or coordinates analogy.
what-are-embeddings.successMessage: Making embeddings intuitive is hard. Your analogy nails it.

vector-databases-101.instruction: Compare 3 vector DB options (pgvector, Pinecone, Weaviate). Each: pricing, best use case, one limitation.
vector-databases-101.successMessage: Right vector DB = critical architecture decision. You can advise on it.

chunking-strategies.instruction: 50-page technical manual to chunk for RAG. Describe 3 chunking strategies with pros/cons.
chunking-strategies.successMessage: Chunking strategy makes or breaks RAG quality.

the-rag-loop.instruction: Draw the complete RAG loop: user query to AI response. Include query embedding, vector search, context assembly, prompt construction.
the-rag-loop.successMessage: The entire RAG pipeline mapped. Foundation of every AI knowledge system.

build-your-first-rag.instruction: Write a prompt for Claude to generate a minimal RAG system using Supabase pgvector. Include table schema, embedding function, search, query.
build-your-first-rag.successMessage: Buildable RAG spec. Running in an hour.

prompt-augmentation.instruction: Write a RAG prompt template: retrieved context + user question = answer. Handle cases where context doesn't contain the answer.
prompt-augmentation.placeholder: You are a helpful assistant. Context: {context}...
prompt-augmentation.successMessage: Prompt template with edge case handling. Production-ready.

hybrid-search.instruction: Explain hybrid search (vector + keyword). Give an example where vector-only fails but hybrid succeeds.
hybrid-search.successMessage: Hybrid search is the secret sauce of production RAG.

evaluation-metrics.instruction: Define 3 RAG quality metrics: one for retrieval, one for answers, one for user satisfaction. How to measure each.
evaluation-metrics.successMessage: You can't improve what you can't measure.

advanced-patterns.instruction: Describe 3 advanced RAG patterns: query expansion, re-ranking, multi-step retrieval. When to use each and tradeoffs.
advanced-patterns.successMessage: These patterns separate basic RAG from production-grade.

rag-quiz.instruction: CTO asks: 'Fine-tuning vs RAG — when should we use which?' Write a clear comparison.
rag-quiz.placeholder: Fine-tuning is best when... RAG is best when...
rag-quiz.successMessage: The most important decision in AI engineering. Nailed.
